title: vriesea × devansayana
intro: Vriesea × devansayana, also known as Tiger's Jaw or Tiger's Mouth, is a hybrid epiphytic plant species within the family Bromeliaceae. The medicinal properties of Vriesea × devansayana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Vriesea × devansayana is prepared as a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
